title: ononis vulgaris var. confusa
intro: Ononis vulgaris var. confusa, also known as the garden burnet or burnet saxifrage, is a perennial plant in the legume family native to Europe, western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Ononis vulgaris var. confusa include its ability to treat kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its high levels of flavonoids and saponins. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of these conditions and promote overall well-being.
